title: Send an email IMAP/POP
excerpt: I am wanting to send an email from an automation. When Date arrives send an email. I tried to use Zapier but it’s not working.  CompsysCloud hosts our inbox. It is IMAP/POP I cannot find a solution for this.

posts.author: liza5495 (Elizabeth Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: I am wanting to send an email from an automation. When Date arrives send an email. I tried to use Zapier but it’s not working. CompsysCloud hosts our inbox. It is IMAP/POP I cannot find a solution for this.

posts.author: fifield21 (Carrie )
posts.cookedHtml:
This might be a non native integration. I would recommend using make.com.

If you need help reach out to Axanexa- they are integrations experts and will work wonders for you.

If you want to DIY it then sign up for a make account here: https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=axanexa

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @liza5495,

I’m happy to share that there’s a new app in the monday.com marketplace - IMAP Email Connector, that allows you to integrate standard IMAP email accounts.

Key Features

Inbound Email Automations: Automatically create new items or post updates in your monday.com boards when emails arrive in your IMAP inbox. All relevant email content is added as updates to the new item, so your team never misses critical information.

Outbound Email Automations: Set automations to send emails whenever a status changes, or a new item is created. Customize email recipients and content directly from your monday.com board.

Advanced Filtering Options: Use powerful filters to control which emails trigger actions. Filter emails by subject line, body content, or sender to process only the emails that matter most to your team.

Easy IMAP Configuration: Connect your IMAP email account effortlessly. Customize server settings for both IMAP and SMTP to meet your specific needs.

If you need help setting this up, feel free to contact us at: support@deview-studios.com
